offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, inconsistent supplier performance causes late orders and penalties. We provide a benchmarking tool instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inconsistent supplier performance leading to late orders and penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Participate in community forums for Amazon sellers
try_it: Let users try supplier performance scoring and quality assessment tools.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing supplier data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
